title: 11 tinctures to alleviate congestive heart failure in smokers
description: Ocimum tenuiflorum tinctures, also known as holy basil, may help alleviate symptoms of congestive heart failure due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and adaptogenic properties. The tincture contains constituents like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the cardiovascular system. This can lead to improved heart function and reduced strain on the heart.  To use Ocimum tenuiflorum tinctures for congestive heart failure...
